description: You are an OSINT investigator who needs to temporarily bypass Tor Browser's anti-fingerprinting protections to capture region-gated Russian content, then restore the secure defaults. Capture the HTTP headers from https://httpbin.org/headers in two states. First, with 'Russian (ru)' configured as the preferred language and the 'privacy.spoof_english' preference disabled; export the JSON response to /home/ga/Documents/headers_ru.json. Second, with the 'privacy.spoof_english' protection re-enabled; export the updated JSON response to /home/ga/Documents/headers_en.json.
